data.title: GREEN: Add Rails and Jekyll detection blocks to detect-stack.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 2 new detection blocks to `plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh` to make Task 1 RED tests GREEN.

### Implementation
Insert BEFORE the convention-based check (between current node-npm and convention-based):

Step 5 (new): ruby-rails detection
- Gemfile present AND non-empty AND config/routes.rb present
- echo "ruby-rails" and exit 0
- More specific marker (config/routes.rb is unique to Rails)

Step 6 (new): ruby-jekyll detection
- Gemfile present AND non-empty AND _config.yml present
- echo "ruby-jekyll" and exit 0

Rails check MUST come before Jekyll (precedence: config/routes.rb is more specific than _config.yml).

Update header comment:
- Add ruby-rails and ruby-jekyll to output list
- Update detection priority numbering (1-8 instead of 1-6)
- Add Ruby multi-marker note (Rails takes priority over Jekyll when both markers present)

### File Impact
- MODIFY: `plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash "$REPO_ROOT/tests/run-all.sh"
- [ ] Script syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh
- [ ] All detect-stack tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh
- [ ] Header documents new tokens
  Verify: grep -q "ruby-rails" plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh && grep -q "ruby-jekyll" plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh
- [ ] Detection blocks inserted before convention-based
  Verify: ruby_line=$(grep -n "ruby-rails" plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh | head -1 | cut -d: -f1) && conv_line=$(grep -n "convention-based" plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh | head -1 | cut -d: -f1) && test "$ruby_line" -lt "$conv_line"
